name: gather_or_delete_clusters
description: List, get details about, or delete Palette clusters. Supports filtering by active status, pagination, and compact output.

active_only.description: Filter to only running/active clusters (for 'list' action)

limit.description: Max number of results to return

project_id.description: Override default project UID for this call

api_key.description: Override default API key for this call

name: gather_or_delete_clusterprofiles
description: List, get details about, or delete Palette cluster profiles.

uid.description: Cluster profile UID (required for 'get' and 'delete' actions)

limit.description: Max number of results to return

project_id.description: Override default project UID for this call

api_key.description: Override default API key for this call

name: getKubeconfig
description: Download the kubeconfig (or admin kubeconfig) for a Palette cluster.

cluster_uid.description: UID of the cluster to retrieve kubeconfig for

admin_config.description: Retrieve admin kubeconfig instead of user kubeconfig

project_id.description: Override default project UID for this call

api_key.description: Override default API key for this call

name: search_and_manage_resource_tags
description: Search and manage tags on Palette resources (clusters, cluster profiles, edge hosts, policies, and cluster templates). Supports list, get, create, and delete actions.

resource_type.description: Resource type to manage tags on

tags.description: Tags to apply (for 'create' action), as key:value strings

project_id.description: Override default project UID for this call

api_key.description: Override default API key for this call
